title: Sweet Memories of Gutar Goo
description: Open this special album to meet Gutar Goo and his rocking family and friends. Join the pigeon as he steps out of his (egg)shell into a wonderful new world where he finds his flock and is embraced with love and joy. A tongue-in-cheek book that celebrates identity and of course, pigeons.

YOU ARE INVITED TO
Gutar Goo's
BIRTHDAY PARTY
Date 13th October 1982
Time 11am
Address B 8 6055, 12th floor,
East-facing air conditioner
Dove Cote apartments
Gutar’s first birthday
So many gifts!

My dearest Gutar,
I'm so sorry dadi and I will not be able to make it to your first birthday party.
Dadi has a bad cold and has been sneezing a lot, so she did not want to pass on germs to your friends.
We haven't forgotten to send you a gift though! It should reach you by post very soon.
Wishing you a very HAPPY BIRTHDAY!
We both are very proud of you and talk about you all the time. We love you with all our heart.
Dada and Dadi
First day of school

OTHER COMMENTS
CLASS TEACHER'S COMMENTS
Even though Gutar Goo is often found staring outside of the window during class hours, he always manages to finish his class work and home work. Sometimes he asks deep questions like "Where does the sky end?" He is exceptionally creative and very kind-hearted. He is very curious about the world.
Done with school!

We’re so proud of Gutar
DOVETAIL ACADEMY
PEEPUL TREE STREET
GUTAR PRADESH

TOURISTY ROUTES FOR ADVENTUROUS PIGEONS
Legend has it, that 1 million years back a giant bird, almost the size of a small country, flew all the way from Gutar Pradesh into the middle of the Indian ocean and released a giant sized bird dropping into the water and the mythical Poo island was formed. The island is said to have suddenly disappeared about 500 years ago after a volcanic eruption of compressed gases. In recent times there have been some daredevil Avian expeditions that have aimed to find the exact location of Poo Island.

Dearest Mumma and Dadda,
I’m sending you picture of me
and my new friend from the
continent of Ostrich.
He’s a bit camera-shy. I’ll be
seeing you soon!
xxx
Gutar
POO ISLAND ADVENTURE ASSOCIATION
This is to certify that
GUTAR GOO
was part of the
677838494480498th
trip to re-discover
the mythical island of
Poo on 1 JULY 1983
Authorised signature

Welcome back, Gutar!
We missed these cuddles

PAVO CHRISTATUS SCHOOL OF DRAMATIC ARTS
The sky is the limit, Gutar Goo!
Time to leave for college
SUBJECT: ADMISSION TO THE PAVO CHRISTATUS SCHOOL OF DRAMATIC ARTS
On behalf of the Pavo Christatus School of Dramatic Arts, I am pleased to inform you that your admission request has been accepted for spring 1983. (Please note that it is spring here in the land of the Emu and December gets pretty hot unlike in Gutar Pradesh.)
We were very impressed by your cooing abilities and also your impersonations of fellow avians that we saw in the tape recording that you sent with your application.
We look forward to having a
talented student like you with us.
From
The Dean,
Pavo Christatus School of Dramatic Arts,
Kookabura Forest,
Land of the Emu,
July 31, 1983
Dean
Cockatoo Peck

IDENTITY CARD

BIRDY NUM NUM
HOME FOR EGGS THAT ARE ALWAYS LOVED
Dear Gutar and Salim,
We are happy to inform you that we have booked an appointment for you to visit the ‘Birdy Num Num Home for Eggs that are always Loved’. We hope you will find a loving addition to your family here.
Your appointment has been booked on 11th January 1984 at 10:30am. Kindly be punctual.
With warm regards
Ms. Futki
Gutar and Salim see Maina for the first time
BIRDY NUM NUM
HOME FOR EGGS THAT ARE ALWAYS LOVED
Maina at home

Can’t wait to see our little grandchild
Dearest Maina,
We can’t wait to meet our most beautiful niece!
Sending you many cuddles and kisses.
Romi, Pinki,
Lovey, Dovey
Love is love
